translations.en: a man bent over with age. An old brown tunic hangs loosely on him.
translations.zh: 一位因老邁而駝背之男子，身著一件鬆垮的褐色舊衫。

translations.en: He looks at you, then looks over his shoulder and shouts to someone behind him.
translations.zh: 他看了汝一眼，隨即回頭朝身後之人大喊。

translations.en: "There, I told you, Marta. New people, new food for our souls."
translations.zh: 「瞧，我說了吧，瑪塔。新來的人，是滋養靈魂的新養分。」

translations.en: He turns back to you. "Welcome to the @Haunting @Inn."
translations.zh: 他轉回面向汝。「歡迎來到@鬼影@旅店。」

translations.en: "Come and sit, for you must have many @tales."
translations.zh: 「坐下吧，汝定有許多@故事可說。」

translations.en: "Is it you, $P?" he says, leaning close and staring you in the eyes.
translations.zh: 「是汝嗎，$P？」他俯身靠近，直視汝的雙眼。

translations.en: "Of course it is! Welcome back, traveler."
translations.zh: 「當然是！歡迎回來，旅人。」

translations.en: "@Gideon, my friend, Gideon's what I'm called by one and all."
translations.zh: 「@吉迪恩，朋友，人人都這麼叫我。」

translations.en: "Yes, let us swap stories for a while..."
translations.zh: 「好，讓我們互相交流一番……」

translations.en: "Tis an old family name meaning 'one who spreads the @word.'"
translations.zh: 「這是個古老的家族名，意為『傳揚@言語之人』。」

translations.en: "My @wife tells me I spread too many of them around."
translations.zh: 「我@妻子說我傳的閒話太多了。」

translations.en: "The word I spread is one of kindness to all souls!"
translations.zh: 「我所傳揚的，是待人善良之道！」

translations.en: "Yes."
translations.zh: 「是的。」

translations.en: "My @wife would say it is to annoy the customers with idle @banter. She's dear."
translations.zh: 「我@妻子會說，是拿閒@話聒噪客人。她真可愛。」

translations.en: "I have @rooms for let."
translations.zh: 「在下有@房間可出租。」

translations.en: "When I was a young man I visited the @shrine to contemplate an emptiness I felt inside."
translations.zh: 「我年輕時曾去@聖壇默思心中的空洞。」

translations.en: "Marta was there, so beautiful and shy."
translations.zh: 「瑪塔也在那裡，如此美麗又靦腆。」

translations.en: "We sat in silence together for hours."
translations.zh: 「我們靜靜地並肩坐了好幾個時辰。」

translations.en: "Finally, she could take no more and turned and kissed me."
translations.zh: 「最後，她再也忍不住，轉身吻了我。」

translations.en: A shout comes from the room behind him.
translations.zh: 身後的房間中傳來一聲喊叫。

translations.en: He answers, "No, @Marta, our guests are not asleep yet."
translations.zh: 他答道：「不，@瑪塔，客人們還沒睡著。」

translations.en: "That name used to be just words."
translations.zh: 「這個名字過去不過是空有其名。」

translations.en: "But now, with what @Marta saw..."
translations.zh: 「但如今，自從@瑪塔所見之後……」

translations.en: "The shrine of Spirituality. It is where we go when we are troubled."
translations.zh: 「靈性聖壇。那是我等心有煩憂時前去之所。」

translations.en: "You should visit it sometime."
translations.zh: 「汝應該找機會去拜訪。」

translations.en: "She hasn't come out of that room since she saw that darn ghost in the dining room a few nights ago."
translations.zh: 「自從幾夜前她在餐廳看見那個該死的幽靈，她便再也沒有走出那個房間。」

translations.en: "She told me the lanterns went out and a spectre drifted in front of her."
translations.zh: 「她告訴我，燈火驟滅，一個幽靈就飄到她面前。」

translations.en: "She let out such a @scream that I heard her from our bedroom."
translations.zh: 「她@尖叫得如此之響，我在臥房都聽見了。」

translations.en: He shakes his head and glances at the room behind him.
translations.zh: 他搖了搖頭，瞥了一眼身後的房間。

translations.en: "My Marta doesn't spook that easy. After all, she's woke up next to me all these years."
translations.zh: 「我的瑪塔可不是那麼容易被嚇到的。畢竟這些年她都睡在我身旁。」

translations.en: "At first I thought maybe I should lock the @cupboard where we keep the wine."
translations.zh: 「起初我以為，應是有人私開存酒的@櫥櫃。」

translations.en: "But I don't think my Marta's been nippin'. I wish I knew what she saw."
translations.zh: 「但我不覺得我的瑪塔偷喝了酒。只希望知道她究竟看到了什麼。」

translations.en: "If you've never had @Stivius' wine, you're in for a treat."
translations.zh: 「若汝未曾品嚐@斯提維斯的葡萄酒，汝將大飽口福。」

translations.en: "He's the alchemist who lives on @Iver's Rounding."
translations.zh: 「他是住在@艾佛圓角的鍊金術士。」

translations.en: "You'll need a boat to get there though."
translations.zh: 「不過去那裡需要坐船。」

translations.en: "It was named after a famous pirate who beached his craft there during a storm."
translations.zh: 「那地名源自一位著名海盜，他曾在風暴中將船擱淺於此。」

translations.en: "He lives next door. Strange fellow..."
translations.zh: 「他住在隔壁，奇怪的傢伙……」

translations.en: "I think he's sampled too much of his own wares."
translations.zh: 「我想他嚐了太多自己的貨品。」

translations.en: "I'm sure by now you've heard such banter about old Quenton."
translations.zh: 「想必汝也聽過不少關於老昆頓的閒話了。」

translations.en: "He was a dear soul." Gideon looks past you into the distance.
translations.zh: 「他是個可貴的靈魂。」吉迪恩目光越過汝，望向遠方。

translations.en: "I could not believe it was him by the well." His eyes become watery.
translations.zh: 「我無法相信井邊躺著的是他。」他眼眶溼潤了。

translations.en: "He lay so quiet, no sign of pain on his face, and just an @amulet in his bloody hand."
translations.zh: 「他靜靜地躺著，臉上毫無痛苦之色，血手中只握著一枚@護符。」

translations.en: He looks at the floor and mumbles. "@Quen, I miss you, old mate."
translations.zh: 他低頭喃喃自語。「@昆，我想念你啊，老夥伴。」

translations.en: "We came to this island many years ago."
translations.zh: 「我們多年前同來到這座島上。」

translations.en: "As children we'd take the boats and race around the point."
translations.zh: 「小時候我們常划船繞著礁角競速。」

translations.en: "Marta and I took care of him when @Mondain's henchmen killed his wife @Elisabeth."
translations.zh: 「當@蒙丹的爪牙殺了他的妻子@伊麗莎貝絲時，瑪塔和我照顧了他。」

translations.en: "We care for his daughter, Marney, now. She's such a brave girl." He pauses a moment then continues.
translations.zh: 「如今我們照料他的女兒瑪妮。她是個如此勇敢的姑娘。」他停頓片刻後繼續說道。

translations.en: "Neither I nor the @travelers staying here heard anything the night he was @killed."
translations.zh: 「他遇害那夜，我和住在這裡的@旅人都沒有聽到任何動靜。」

translations.en: He looks at you a moment, then leans closer. "They say that Quenton was killed by a Gargoyle."
translations.zh: 他看了汝片刻，俯身靠近。「據說昆頓是被一隻魔像族殺害的。」

translations.en: "I've heard these beasts eat their prey. Why did they leave Quenton alone then?"
translations.zh: 「聽說這些惡獸會吃掉獵物。那為何昆頓遺體完好？」

translations.en: "Yes, Quenton and Yorl were out fishing when a few of those evil ones landed here."
translations.zh: 「是的，昆頓和尤爾在外捕魚時，那幾個惡徒在此登陸。」

translations.en: "They were fleeing Lord British's men and apparently thought our hamlet was safe haven."
translations.zh: 「他們正在逃避不列顛王的人馬，顯然以為此村可作藏身之所。」

translations.en: "They went around asking for some person named Relthor, or @Renthar... something like that."
translations.zh: 「他們四處詢問一個名叫瑞索爾，或是@瑞塔爾……諸如此類的人。」

translations.en: "She was an angel to view. Blonde hair, green eyes, tall slender body. Marney could be her twin."
translations.zh: 「她美如天使。金髮、綠眸、高挑身段。瑪妮幾乎是她的翻版。」

translations.en: "I can still see Elisa's brave face as the men led her to their boat."
translations.zh: 「我至今仍記得伊麗莎被人押向船隻時那張勇敢的臉龐。」

translations.en: "They said that after she got them past their pursuers she would be freed." He hides his face in his hands.
translations.zh: 「他們說，等她幫他們甩脫追兵便予放人。」他雙手掩面。

translations.en: "Our beliefs held us still."
translations.zh: 「我等的信仰令我等駐足不動。」

translations.en: "She turned and handed @something to her crying little @girl."
translations.zh: 「她轉身將@某物遞給了哭泣的小@女兒。」

translations.en: "Then she @boarded the skiff, and they were gone."
translations.zh: 「而後她@登上小船，他們便離去了。」

translations.en: "She, like her mother, is strong in her @beliefs."
translations.zh: 「她如其母一般，@信念堅定。」

translations.en: "When we buried her father, she sang a song she wrote for him." He softly sings.
translations.zh: 「我們安葬她父親時，她唱了一首她為父親所作之歌。」他輕聲哼起來。

translations.en: "'You put your love in my heart, and now it's fallen apart, but all alone in the dark, I will remove the pain.'"
translations.zh: 「『汝將汝的愛植入我心，如今已是支離破碎，但我獨處黑暗之中，誓將痛苦消融。』」

translations.en: "'There is a sting in my eyes, and your name in my cries, but still I realize, that you are part of me.'"
translations.zh: 「『眼中刺痛，哭喊中是汝之名，然我深知，汝已是我的一部分。』」

translations.en: "Elisabeth bowed her head as they sailed off." He looks absently at the floor and attempts to clear his throat.
translations.zh: 「伊麗莎貝絲在船駛離時低下了頭。」他茫然地看著地板，試圖清嗓。

translations.en: Speaking again, his voice is a whisper. "They found her body along the @coast south of here."
translations.zh: 再度開口，他的聲音已成低語。「他們在此地南方的@海岸邊找到了她的遺體。」

translations.en: He looks at you, his eyes red and his lip quivering. He simply nods.
translations.zh: 他看著汝，雙眼泛紅、嘴唇顫抖，只是默默點頭。

translations.en: "I couldn't see what it was."
translations.zh: 「我看不清那是何物。」

translations.en: "We had no such person in this town. Not by that name."
translations.zh: 「鎮上沒有這樣的人，不叫那個名字。」

translations.en: "We are a peaceful people."
translations.zh: 「我等是愛好和平之民。」

translations.en: "We believe that all men have hearts that can possess either good or evil."
translations.zh: 「我等相信，人人之心皆可善亦可惡。」

translations.en: "These evil ones believed that by tearing down others, they could become more powerful."
translations.zh: 「那些惡徒以為踩低他人便能使自己強大。」

translations.en: "The truth is, when you tear down another's ladder you become no higher, they just become lower."
translations.zh: 「真相是，當汝毀去他人的梯子，汝並未因此更高，只是他人更低了。」

translations.en: "It is harder to build your ladder on your own, but you will see farther in the end."
translations.zh: 「靠自己搭建梯子更為艱難，然最終汝所見的將更為遼遠。」

translations.en: "I questioned them about the night of the murder."
translations.zh: 「我詢問了他們關於命案當夜之事。」

translations.en: "Still, of all of us, my Marta and I had the best vantage point from which to witness, or even hear, the murder."
translations.zh: 「然而，在我等之中，瑪塔和我的位置最佳，最可能目睹乃至聽聞那場謀殺。」

translations.en: "Yet we saw and heard nothing."
translations.zh: 「然而我等所見所聞皆是一片空無。」

translations.en: "We went and told Yorl what had happened."
translations.zh: 「我等去告知尤爾此事。」

translations.en: "When he returned with us to the well, he removed the amulet from Quenton's hand and took it to Marney."
translations.zh: 「他與我等返回井邊時，從昆頓手中取出護符，帶去交給瑪妮。」

translations.en: "It took courage to tell her the news."
translations.zh: 「將此消息告知她，需要莫大的勇氣。」

translations.en: "He means well, it's just his attitude is all wrong for the job."
translations.zh: 「他本意是好的，只是那種態度實在不適合這份差事。」

translations.en: "He should spend some time in New @Magincia."
translations.zh: 「他應該去新@馬精西亞待一段時間。」

translations.en: "You should sail there someday."
translations.zh: 「汝哪天應該乘船前往一遊。」

translations.en: His eyes light up "He is one of the friendliest people in this hamlet."
translations.zh: 他眼睛一亮。「他是此村莊中最友善的人之一。」

translations.en: "You must go see him, down by the pier." He stares absently at your shirt pocket.
translations.zh: 「汝必須去碼頭邊找他。」他茫然地凝視著汝的衣袋。

translations.en: "He's been like a father to Marney."
translations.zh: 「他對瑪妮而言如同父親。」

translations.en: "She's a dear soul. I sometimes feel sorry for her. I mean, her weight and all."
translations.zh: 「她是個可貴的靈魂。我有時為她感到惋惜，就是，體態方面。」

translations.en: "Still, she is one of the most interesting people I've ever met."
translations.zh: 「儘管如此，她是我所見過最有趣的人之一。」

translations.en: "Now there's a sad soul. He was so young when he got tangled up with the wrong group of kids."
translations.zh: 「那真是個可悲的靈魂。他年紀尚小便與壞孩子混在一起了。」

translations.en: "Had he been raised by someone with a good heart, he might have been one of Lord @British's greatest knights."
translations.zh: 「若他由善良之人撫養成人，或許早已成為不列顛@陛下最傑出的騎士之一。」

translations.en: "I'm just an innkeep. Ask @Yorl: his father used to sail for our ruler."
translations.zh: 「我不過是個客棧掌柜。去問@尤爾吧，他父親昔日曾為吾王效命航海。」

translations.en: "Come back, dear souls."
translations.zh: 「再來啊，親愛的旅人們。」

translations.en: "Ask someone else about that."
translations.zh: 「此事另詢他人吧。」

translations.en: "#0 gold for a room and a meal. Interested?"
translations.zh: 「房間加餐飯共#0枚金幣。有興趣否？」

translations.en: "I'm sorry, but we require cash in advance for our rooms.
translations.zh: 「抱歉，在下的旅店須預付現金。

translations.en: You sleep in a comfortable bed...
translations.zh: 汝躺在舒適的床鋪上安然入眠……

translations.en: You wake rested and eat a large breakfast.
translations.zh: 汝醒來後精神煥發，飽食了一頓豐盛早餐。

translations.en: "Good morning, my friend
translations.zh: 「早安，朋友

translations.en: "Perhaps some other time, then.
translations.zh: 「那便改日再說。

translator_notes: 083 Gideon: 鬼影旅店老闆，慈祥多話。含昆頓謀殺案、伊麗莎貝絲悲劇主線。歌詞意譯。
